rationale: In the methodology section, the authors explicitly state that their two-stage, sequential hierarchical regression approach is similar to Slotegraaf, Moorman, and Inman (2003). The citation is used to support a concrete modeling choice, especially the residual-based second-stage specification, rather than as a generic literature mention. While the substantive domain differs, the cited paper provides a direct empirical-analytic precedent for how the citing paper structures its tests.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the estimation logic used in Slotegraaf, Moorman, and Inman (2003), using a two-stage sequential framework in which first-stage residualized attribute satisfaction feeds second-stage quality models. It transfers that methodological template to a different context focused on longitudinal shifts in satisfaction drivers.
